title: carya cathayensis
intro: Carya cathayensis, also known as Chinese hickory or Chinese walnut, is a deciduous tree native to southern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carya cathayensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Carya cathayensis include tea infusions and extracts, which are traditionally used in Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
